faqs.question: Why are silverfish common in Piscataway homes?
faqs.answer: Piscataway's humid New Jersey climate and proximity to the Raritan River create moisture-rich environments that attract silverfish. These pests thrive in damp basements, bathrooms, attics, and crawl spaces common in both older and newer Piscataway properties.
